name: The Wizard's Daughter
original_name: ลูกสาวพ่อมด
overview: This lakorn is a remake of various classics, set at the beginning of World War II during Japanese occupation of Thailand. Enemies becoming friends and tells the story of a Japanese soldier who falls for a Thai girl and how love can even overcome the boundaries of war. This story also has a supernatural aspect that makes for exciting viewing.

trailers.title: [Teaser] ละคร ลูกสาวพ่อมด (2) :: 24/6/57
